---
title: "Orca Recovery Plan for ENVS 137"
description: "Conservation plan for the recovery of orcas in the Salish Sea"
author: "Sophie Pardehpoosh"
date: 2026-02-19
categories: [Environment, Conservation]
---

For ENVS 137 at UCSB, "Conservation Planning" with Dawn Murray, we spent the quarter working on a conservation plan for a species or area of our choice. My group chose to focus on conservation of orca whales in the Salish Sea. See the full conservation plan below. 


<iframe src="../../files/conservation_plan_draft.pdf" width="100%" height="800px"></iframe>
